name: 🦷 Dental Clinic AI Voice Agent (DUMMY - No API Keys Needed)

nodes.name: 📞 Incoming Call Webhook
nodes.notes: Twilio sends call data here. Path = dental-call. Copy this URL and paste in Twilio Voice webhook.

nodes.name: 🔍 Parse Call Data
nodes.notes: Parses Twilio POST body + URL query params. No API needed.

nodes.name: 🤖 DUMMY AI Logic (Replace with Gemini)
nodes.notes: DUMMY: Simulates Gemini AI. Replace this with Google Gemini node when you have API key. See README for exact prompt to use.

nodes.name: ✅ Booking Complete?
nodes.notes: TRUE path → Save to Airtable + Confirm. FALSE path → Continue conversation.

nodes.name: 💾 DUMMY Airtable Save (Replace with Airtable node)
nodes.notes: DUMMY: Logs what would be saved. Replace with real Airtable node. See README for field mapping.

nodes.name: 📋 Build Confirm TwiML
nodes.notes: Builds TwiML that says confirmation and hangs up the call.

nodes.name: 🔄 Build Continue TwiML
nodes.notes: ⚠️ Replace YOUR-N8N-URL in the code with your actual n8n URL before testing!

nodes.name: 📤 Respond to Twilio (Confirm)
nodes.notes: Sends XML back to Twilio. Content-Type must be text/xml.

nodes.name: 📤 Respond to Twilio (Continue)
nodes.notes: Sends XML back to Twilio. Content-Type must be text/xml.

main.node: 💾 DUMMY Airtable Save (Replace with Airtable node)
